case_title: GOLDMAN, SACHS & CO. et al VS. RICHARD PEREZ et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-22-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; POS IN SUPPORT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER GOLDMAN, SACHS & CO. HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GOLDMAN, SACHS & CO.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR#2647.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PETITIONER GOLDMAN, SACHS & CO. UNDERWOOD, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RESPONDENT PEREZ' DEMANDS FOR MONETARY, PUNITIVE, AND EXEMPLARY DAMAGES ARE DENIED; RESPONDENT PEREZ TO PAY ALL FORUM FEES; RESPONDENT NASD TO EXPUNGE ALL RECORDS RELATING TO PCX CASE NO. -2-S062 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR JUDGMENT AT LENGTH)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY PETITIONER GOLDMAN, SACHS & CO.
